headline: There Is An Anti ESG Energy ETF That Will Capture Every Explosive Move When Oil Gets Volatile

headline: Exxon Mobil Weighs Strait Of Hormuz Shock And Rising Oil Prices
summary: Geopolitical tensions in the Middle East have intensified, with military conflict involving the US, Israel, and Iran disrupting tanker traffic through the Strait of Hormuz. The effective closure of this key chokepoint has affected about 20% of global oil supply and pushed oil prices sharply higher. Exxon Mobil (NYSE:XOM), trading at $151.83, is closely watched as higher prices intersect with its expanded US shale footprint following the Pioneer Natural Resources acquisition. Exxon Mobil...

summary: The LNG infrastructure market is driven by investments in onshore storage, liquefaction plants, and pipelines, along with marine transport and heavy-duty vehicle use. Future opportunities include floating regasification, modular plants, and LNG distribution expansion, spurred by electricity demand and transport adoption.
